derivedColors.frameBackground: Darker warm neutral chosen to meet the IntelliJ Islands 1.20:1 minimum contrast recommendation against editor and tool-window surfaces.
derivedColors.frameSoftBackground: Intermediate warm neutral used for inactive and hover states.
derivedColors.accentMuted: Low-contrast selection tint derived from the Proof green accent.
derivedColors.error: Warm red added for editor diagnostics because the source theme does not define an error color.
